title: [Frontend] Add live character counter to configurable product Text section inputs
verdict_reason: All 7 functional ACs observed as working. Minor WCAG 1.4.3 color-contrast finding at at-cap state (4.38:1 vs 4.5:1) flagged as follow-up a11y polish per QA lead decision — not a blocker for this Story's functional goal. AC4 null-maxLength path is data-limited (no QA product with null value).
jira_transition: Ready for test → On QA → Tested (via transition id 4 then 8)

acceptance_criteria.AC4_null_maxlength: NEEDS DATA — retested on /products-with-options/configurations/bed-with-additional-options (MHI-55960404): two Text sections reachable (Cover maxLength=255, Fabric and materials maxLength=10) — both explicit numeric, neither null. Counter behavior on reachable inputs is clean (0/255, live update, hard-cap at 255, no console errors). Null-fallback path cannot be exercised until content team seeds a product with an explicitly-blank MaxLength field. Not a frontend defect.
acceptance_criteria.AC6_wcag_a11y: FAIL — new WCAG 1.4.3 color-contrast violation at at-cap state (confirmed by axe-core). WCAG 1.3.1 + 4.1.3 pass (aria-describedby, role=status, aria-live correctly implemented).

business_rules_verified: BL-CAT-006 — configurable product required sections enforcement (no regression)

bugs_filed.title: WCAG 1.4.3 color-contrast violation: vc-input-details__counter--limit at-cap color (#de3131) on #fafafa = 4.38:1, below 4.5:1 AA minimum
bugs_filed.suggested_fix: Darken at-cap color token (e.g., #c82020 → ~5.3:1 on #fafafa) or bump font-weight to 700 (bold), which lowers threshold to 3:1.

exploratory.charter: Live character counter — boundary conditions, paste, IME, rapid-typing, navigation, mobile, cross-browser (Firefox)
notable_findings: Paste of 50 chars correctly truncates to 30; counter shows 30/30 with at-cap class
CJK BMP characters counted as 1 unit each — correct behavior
Mobile viewports 360px and 768px render counter without clipping
Overflow via IME/programmatic paths shows '35 / 30' in red AND section-header validation 'Text must not exceed 30 characters' — graceful
Question: when 'None' radio is selected on optional section, text input still shows 100/100 in red with aria-live active — worth UX clarification
Cross-browser (Firefox): counter, aria attributes, visual emphasis all work correctly
exploratory.coverage_gap: Two Text sections on same PDP — no such product in current QA data; recommend seeding for future regression

data_gaps: No configurable product in QA has a Text section with null maxLength. On /products-with-options/configurations/bed-with-additional-options the 'Cover' and 'Fabric and materials' Text sections both have explicit numeric maxLength (255 and 10). AC4 retest report at tests/Sprint-current/VCST-4928/ac4-retest-report.md. Seeding required to close AC4.
